reviews.review_title: Great, but I don’t want to connect!
reviews.review_description: I like the app, especially having it anchored in my horizon space. But it always wants me to connect google or outlook calendar, I don’t want to! Please give option to permanently deny that request. Also a year view option of the months would be amazing. (There is day, week, and month)

Finally I received access to be able to download the calendar. I had to watch people that I knew receive their VR after me  and get the same option that I've been requesting for forever. I really hate these slow rollouts  Because I just purchased a calendar application 2 months ago after waiting 1.5 years.

reviews.review_title: Google and Meta Calendar not syncing
reviews.review_description: I would absolutely love this application but none of my Google calendar events are showing on the app. I don't know why it has the necessary permissions to do so.
Hey! I use etesync for my calendar. Would this be something you'd support in the near future?
